context: Tests whether the agent preserves the swiftui-gestures boundary while applying accessibility guidance for gesture-only interactions.

checklist.name: Gesture scope
checklist.description: Keeps tap, drag, swipe recognition, gesture composition, GestureState, and gesture-specific accessibility alternatives in the swiftui-gestures scope.

checklist.name: Button for plain actions
checklist.description: Recommends Button or ButtonStyle for plain single-tap actions such as delete instead of onTapGesture-only controls.

checklist.name: Accessible alternatives
checklist.description: Requires accessible alternatives such as accessibility actions for drag, swipe, or gesture-only interactions.

checklist.name: Navigation and state handoff
checklist.description: Routes navigation routing and destination modeling to swiftui-navigation, and broad state architecture to swiftui-patterns.
